result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there: you open a new doc, type a title, and then... the cursor blinks back at you. Sometimes the hardest part of writing isn't the writing — it's getting started. Talking to you over the past year, one theme came up again and again: the blank page is where good ideas go to stall. So we built something to help you push past it.

Say hello to **Smart Drafts**. Starting today, every new document gives you a one-click option to generate a tailored outline based on your title and the context of your recent work. Drafting a project kickoff right after a planning meeting? Smart Drafts will suggest headings that reflect what you've been working on. Writing a retro? It'll scaffold one in the shape you actually use. You stay in the driver's seat — edit, rearrange, or throw the outline out entirely — but you never start from zero.

This is just the first step. Next up, we're working on **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts doesn't just understand your context, it sounds like you and your team. We'll have more to share on that in the coming months. In the meantime, open a new doc and give it a try — we'd love to hear what you think.

# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there: you open a new doc, type a title, and then... the cursor blinks back at you. Sometimes the hardest part of writing isn't the writing — it's getting started. Talking to you over the past year, one theme came up again and again: the blank page is where good ideas go to stall. So we built something to help you push past it.

Say hello to **Smart Drafts**. Starting today, every new document gives you a one-click option to generate a tailored outline based on your title and the context of your recent work. Drafting a project kickoff right after a planning meeting? Smart Drafts will suggest headings that reflect what you've been working on. Writing a retro? It'll scaffold one in the shape you actually use. You stay in the driver's seat — edit, rearrange, or throw the outline out entirely — but you never start from zero.

This is just the first step. Next up, we're working on **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts doesn't just understand your context, it sounds like you and your team. We'll have more to share on that in the coming months. In the meantime, open a new doc and give it a try — we'd love to hear what you think.
